crime.value: Murder of CIA Deputy Director Kent Larson during undercover operation
crime.quote: Jack stared at the man who had taught him everything he knew, the honorable, Kent Larson, Deputy Director of the CIA.

victim.value: Kent Larson, CIA Deputy Director, targeted due to his knowledge of assassination plot against President-Elect
victim.quote: Kent Larson, Deputy Director of the CIA

closed_world.value: Carlos's Colombian drug cartel compound during dinner party
closed_world.quote: We have hours yet before the dinner party.

investigator.value: Jack Weaver, undercover CIA operative using alias 'Raul'
investigator.quote: Jack responded to his undercover name. "Si?"

red_herring.value: Jack stages his own attack by stabbing himself and vomiting to make it appear he was also a victim of the assassin
red_herring.quote: Somehow he had to make his men think he'd been attacked...Jack plunged the six-inch knife into his thigh

clue_fairness.value: The Emperor file discovered on Jack's laptop provides key information available to both Jack and the reader
clue_fairness.quote: It was on that very balcony, working on his laptop in the middle of the night, he found The Emperor file

social_world.value: Colombian drug cartel hierarchy with Carlos as leader, his security entourage, staff, and CIA institutional power structure
social_world.quote: bring down the largest and most dangerous drug cartel in Colombia...Carlos's entourage of security

alibi.value: Jack's constructed alibi of being attacked during the assassination, supported by his self-inflicted wound
alibi.quote: Somehow he had to make his men think he'd been attacked

reveal_mechanic.value: The revelation that the assassinated man is Kent Larson, Deputy Director of the CIA and Jack's mentor
reveal_mechanic.quote: Jack stared at the man who had taught him everything he knew, the honorable, Kent Larson, Deputy Director

investigator_wound.value: Jack must kill his mentor and CIA superior Kent Larson, exploiting his loyalty conflict and training relationship
investigator_wound.quote: the man who had taught him everything he knew, the honorable, Kent Larson

_meta.title: ebook kelly abell sealed in lies
